memberdef.argsstring: (ServerCredentials const &InCredentialsRef, ServerSettings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< FServerApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: ServerInventory

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserInventoriesPagingResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &UserId=TEXT(""), FString const &InventoryConfigurationCode=TEXT(""), EAccelByteInventoriesSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteInventoriesSortBy::CREATED_AT_DESC, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: GetInventories

briefdescription.para: Retrieve all inventories in the current namespace.

parameterdescription.para: A delegate executed when the request succeeds. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserInventoriesPagingResponse.
A delegate executed when the request fails.
The ID of the inventory owner.
The code for a specific inventory configuration.
The criteria for sorting the list of user inventories. Possible values: "createdAt", "updatedAt", "Configuration". Default: "createdAt:desc".
The number of items per page to retrieve. Default: 20.
The page number to retrieve. Default: 0.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsCreateInventoryRequest const &CreateInventoryRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserInventoryResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CreateInventory

briefdescription.para: Create an inventory for a user with a specific configuration.

parameterdescription.para: A request containing the user ID and inventory configuration code for the target.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserInventoryResponse.
A delegate executed when the request fails.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &InventoryId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserInventoryResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetInventory

briefdescription.para: Retrieve detailed information about a user's inventory.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the user's inventory.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserInventoryResponse.
A delegate executed when the request fails.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &InventoryId, FAccelByteModelsUpdateInventoryRequest const &UpdateInventoryRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserInventoryResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateInventory

detaileddescription.para:
Notes:
A positive value will increase MaxSlots from the existing value.
A negative value will decrease MaxSlots from the existing value.
Limited slots cannot be changed to unlimited, and vice versa.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the user's inventory.
A request to update the inventory.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserInventoryResponse.
A delegate executed when the request fails.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &InventoryConfigurationCode, FAccelByteModelsUpdateInventoryRequest const &UpdateInventoryRequest, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsUserInventoryResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateAllUserInventories

briefdescription.para: Update all inventories related to a specific inventory configuration code.

detaileddescription.para:
Notes:
A positive value will increase MaxSlots from the existing value.
A negative value will decrease MaxSlots from the existing value.
Limited slots cannot be changed to unlimited, and vice versa.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the inventory owner.
The code of the inventory configuration.
A request to update the inventories.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds. The result is FAccelByteModelsUpdateAllInventoriesResponse.
A delegate executed when the request fails.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &InventoryId, FAccelByteModelsDeleteInventoryRequest const &DeleteInventoryRequest, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DeleteInventory

briefdescription.para: Delete a user's inventory based on the ID.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the user's inventory.
A request to delete the inventory.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds.
A delegate executed when the request fails.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &InventoryId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserItemsPagingResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteUserItemsSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteUserItemsSortBy::CREATED_AT_DESC, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, FString const &SourceItemId=TEXT(""), FString const &Tags=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: GetInventoryAllItems

briefdescription.para: Retrieve all inventory items based on the inventory ID.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the user's inventory.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserItemsPagingResponse.
A delegate executed when the request fails.
The criteria for sorting the list of user inventories. Possible values: "createdAt", "updatedAt". Default: "createdAt:desc".
The number of items per page to retrieve. Default: 20.
The page number to retrieve. Default: 0.
The ID of the source item.
The tags of the user's items.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &InventoryId, FString const &SlotId, FString const &SourceItemId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserItemResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetInventoryItem

briefdescription.para: Retrieve detailed information about a user's inventory item based on the inventory ID.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the user's inventory.
The ID of the item slot.
The ID of the source item.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserItemResponse.
A delegate executed when the request fails.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &InventoryId, FAccelByteModelsConsumeUserItemsRequest const &ConsumedItemsRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserItemResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ConsumeInventoryItem

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the inventory owner.
The ID of the user's inventory.
A request containing the quantity, slot ID, and source item ID for the target.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserItemResponse.
A delegate executed when the request fails.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &InventoryId, TArray< FAccelByteModelsUpdateInventoryItemRequest > const &UpdatedItemsRequest, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserInventoryItemResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkUpdateInventoryItems

briefdescription.para: Bulk update a user's inventory items.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the inventory owner.
The ID of the user's inventory.
A request containing the attributes of inventory items to update.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds. The result is a TArray of FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserInventoryItemResponse.
A delegate executed when the request fails.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &InventoryId, FAccelByteModelsSaveInventoryItemByInventoryIdRequest const &SaveItemRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserItemResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SaveInventoryItemByInventoryId

briefdescription.para: Save an item to a user's inventory.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the inventory owner.
The ID of the user's inventory.
A request containing the item details to save.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds. The result is a TArray of FAccelByteModelsUserItemResponse.
A delegate executed when the request fails.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &InventoryId, TArray< FAccelByteModelsDeleteUserInventoryItemsRequest > const &DeletedItemsRequest, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsDeleteUserInventoryItemResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkDeleteUserInventoryItems

briefdescription.para: Bulk delete items from a user's inventory.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the inventory owner.
The ID of the user's inventory.
A request containing the attributes of the inventory items to delete.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds. The result is a TArray of FAccelByteModelsDeleteUserInventoryItemResponse.
A delegate executed when the request fails.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FAccelByteModelsSaveInventoryItemRequest const &SaveItemRequest, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserItemResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SaveInventoryItem

briefdescription.para: Save an item to a user's inventory based on the configuration code.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the inventory owner.
A request containing the item details to save.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserItemResponse.
A delegate executed when the request fails.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, TArray< FAccelByteModelsSaveInventoryItemRequest > const &SaveItemsRequests, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsBulkSaveInventoryItems > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkSaveInventoryItems

briefdescription.para: Bulk save items to a user's inventory.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the inventory owner.
An array of requests, each containing the details of an item to save.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds. The result is a TArray of FAccelByteModelsBulkSaveInventoryItems.
A delegate executed when the request fails.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &InventoryId, TArray< FAccelByteModelsSaveInventoryItemByInventoryIdRequest > const &SaveItemsRequests, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsBulkSaveInventoryItems > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkSaveInventoryItemsByInventoryId

briefdescription.para: Bulk save items to a user's inventory based on the inventory ID.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the inventory owner.
The ID of the user's inventory.
An array of requests, each containing the details of an item to save.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds. The result is a TArray of FAccelByteModelsBulkSaveInventoryItems.
A delegate executed when the request fails.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SyncUserEntitlement

briefdescription.para: Sync a user's entitlement from the e-commerce service to their inventory for items that do not yet exist in the user's inventory.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the inventory owner.
A delegate executed when the request succeeds.
A delegate executed when the request fails.

simplesect.para: An AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (ServerInventory const &)=delete

memberdef.argsstring: (ServerInventory &&)=delete

memberdef.name: ConvertInventoriesSortByToString

memberdef.name: ConvertInventoryItemsSortByToString

briefdescription.para: Provide APIs to access Inventory service.
